data.name: An Evening of Wonders
data.detailed_description:
Your childhood friend is hosting a small house party to celebrate his 21st birthday and you're invited. You haven't really kept in touch with him ever since you started university in two different cities but you're excited to reconnect and meet some of his new friends. One specific stranger seems especially interesting. Your choices will determine how the night goes and whether the beautiful stranger remains just that or, perhaps, becomes someone close to your heart.

An Evening of Wonders is a short adult visual novel that focuses on the characters, romance, and sex. It features choices that lead to 3 different endings, 1 love interest and plenty of fun side characters, quality renders and animations, music, Steam achievements, and more. It also features the ultimate male fantasy of falling in love and being happy.
data.about_the_game:

One specific stranger seems especially interesting. Your choices will determine how the night goes and whether the beautiful stranger remains just that or, perhaps, becomes someone close to your heart.

An Evening of Wonders is a short adult visual novel that focuses on the characters, romance, and sex. It features choices that lead to 3 different endings, 1 love interest and plenty of fun side characters, quality renders and animations, music, Steam achievements, and more. It also features the ultimate male fantasy of falling in love and being happy.
data.short_description: An Evening of Wonders is a short choice-driven adult romance visual novel. Your childhood friend invites you to his birthday party where a beautiful stranger catches your eye. Your choices will determine whether you stay strangers or leave the party holding her hand after a wild night together.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
